title: Calling SV class instance results in "Malformed statement"

features.name: static class method call with scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a static class method call using ClassName::method() syntax within an initial block
features.snippet:
class GlobalSimControl; static function GlobalSimControl create(); return null; endfunction; endclass
initial begin GlobalSimControl gsc; gsc = GlobalSimControl::create(); end
